Home / Services / Whole House Remodeling

Whole House Remodeling

Transform your entire Austin home with our comprehensive remodeling services.

Ready to completely transform your Austin home? Austin Construction Design offers comprehensive whole-house remodeling services that cover every aspect of your property. From updating the layout and finishes to improving energy efficiency and adding square footage, we can help you create the home of your dreams. We understand the unique challenges of remodeling older homes in Austin, including dealing with outdated electrical systems, foundation issues, and asbestos abatement.

Our team has the expertise to handle even the most complex remodeling projects. We'll work closely with you to develop a detailed plan that reflects your vision and budget. We'll manage every aspect of the project, from initial design and permitting to construction, finishing, and final inspection. We coordinate all trades, ensuring a smooth and efficient process. Given Austin's rapid growth, many homeowners are choosing to remodel rather than move. We help homeowners maximize their current space to fit their evolving needs.

We understand that a whole-house remodel can be disruptive, so we'll work hard to minimize the impact on your daily life. We'll maintain a clean and safe work environment and communicate with you regularly throughout the project. We take into account Austin's climate when remodeling whole homes, ensuring proper insulation and ventilation to help keep your home comfortable year-round.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Initial consultation and design development
  2. 02 Step 2: Permitting and pre-construction planning
  3. 03 Step 3: Demolition and structural modifications
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation of new systems and finishes
  5. 05 Step 5: Final inspection and project completion

Benefits

  • Increased home value
  • Improved functionality and flow
  • Enhanced energy efficiency
  • Personalized living space

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a whole-house remodel take?

The duration of a whole-house remodel depends on the size and complexity of the project, but it typically takes between 3 to 9 months. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

Do I need to move out during a whole-house remodel?

It's generally recommended to move out during a whole-house remodel, as the construction process can be disruptive and uncomfortable. We'll work with you to minimize the impact on your daily life and provide regular updates on the project's progress.

Can you help with design and space planning?

Yes, we have experienced designers who can help you create a functional and stylish design that meets your needs and preferences. We'll consider factors like layout, flow, and storage to create the perfect space.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with whole house remodeling? Contact us today.
